text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Trainer. 
Where might you be going?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm waiting for a friend of mine, but…

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It seems they forgot we were going out 
and overslept. Hehe, they can be like 
that sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
They said it'll take them an hour to get ready,
so I'm just relaxing while I wait.
